attributes.readMe:
## PopoverState

The per-host state machine that owns the currently-open popover's `(row, col, kind)` plus the hover-pause and dismiss-grace timers. Pulls ~150 lines of repeated gesture state out of every host component into one class.

The host owns ONE instance per surface root (one open popover at a time) and passes it to the `surfacePopoverBinding` modifier on each hover-target element. Drives the desktop gesture model: hover ~500ms → details opens; pointer leaves source + popover → 200ms grace; pointer enters popover → grace canceled; click → edit opens; escalate transitions kind without unmounting.

```ts
import { createPopoverState } from '../utils/popover-state';

this.popoverState = createPopoverState({ /* options */ });
```

Exports: `PopoverState` (class), `createPopoverState` (factory), and the `PopoverTarget` / `PopoverStateOptions` / `PopoverContract` types.
